playerOneReport.risk_reason: Your score is 58/100 because your current profile mix (year 2nd year, State Govt, Kolkata) is exposed to automation pressure in core entry-level tasks. You currently lack enough future-safe skills, which increases placement risk.

pivot_1.title: AI Product Engineer
pivot_1.why: Kolkata hiring trends favor engineers who can build AI features end-to-end, not only write code tickets.
pivot_1.first_step: Build one production-style AI workflow and deploy it with monitoring.

pivot_2.title: Cloud + Security Migration
pivot_2.why: International hiring remains strongest in cloud security and platform engineering compared with junior feature roles.
pivot_2.first_step: Complete one cloud-security project with architecture notes and threat controls.

week_plan.action: Audit your current profile and remove weak resume lines. Keep only outcomes that prove impact in Kolkata.
Build one AI-assisted mini feature and publish a short demo video.
Start your flagship project and define what business result it should create.
Design architecture for scale and write trade-offs in simple English.
Add logs, error tracking, and measurable success metrics.
Publish your project write-up and request feedback from seniors.
Connect with 5 people in your target role and ask what they are hiring for now.
Build second project focused on automation and practical ROI.
Refine resume and portfolio with quantified outcomes.
Apply to 15 high-fit opportunities and track response patterns.
Practice interviews around your real project decisions.
Polish weak areas and relaunch with updated project evidence.
